text.title: img-gen-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for img-gen-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: File-based URL caching for DALL-E generated images
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DALL-E pre-signed URLs expire in ~1 hour. Agents resuming after 1+ hours get 404 on all cached entries. Cache image bytes to S3 instead.

failure-mode.description: Passing **kwargs directly to multiple providers with incompatible parameter sets
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DALL-E 3 accepts quality and style parameters; SDXL does not. Passing unified kwargs causes TypeError on incompatible providers.

failure-mode.description: Running generate_variant_set without rate-limit delays between DALL-E calls
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: DALL-E tier-1 rate limit is 5 images/minute (12s/image). Generating 12 variants without delay triggers 429 errors on all but the first few requests.

failure-mode.description: Using output[0] to access Replicate Flux-schnell results
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Flux output format varies by model version; some return a URL string, not a list. Use next(iter(output)) instead.

failure-mode.description: Relying on file-based cache for image bytes — cached entries go stale when provider URLs expire
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provider URLs expire (~1 hour for DALL-E). Agents resuming after 1+ hours will get 404 on cached entries. Always revalidate before returning cached result or use byte-based cache with S3/Redis backend.
